summary.para: Get machine learning memory usage info. Get information about how machine learning jobs and trained models are using memory, on each node, both within the JVM heap, and natively, outside of the JVM.
Period to wait for a connection to the master node. If no response is received before the timeout expires, the request fails and returns an error.
The names of particular nodes in the cluster to target. For example, nodeId1,nodeId2 or ml:true
Period to wait for a response. If no response is received before the timeout expires, the request fails and returns an error.
